mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in industrial production signal expanding corporate output and earnings capacity, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 20-day forward returns following month-over-month INDPRO increases are not positive in >55% of months over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An elevated federal funds rate above 5% tightens financial conditions, raises discount rates, and reduces equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 60-day forward returns are not negative in at least 60% of instances when FEDFUNDS exceeds 5.0% over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous deterioration in unemployment and retail sales reflects collapsing household income and spending, forecasting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal from UNRATE and RSAFS yields a walk-forward Rank IC below 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: During monetary tightening cycles, month-over-month acceleration in consumer prices heightens fears of overshooting inflation and more aggressive Fed action, compressing equity multiples and generating negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: During periods when FEDFUNDS is increasing over a 3-month window, CPIAUCSL month-over-month acceleration fails to coincide with negative S&P 500 60-day forward returns in >60% of instances over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month rise in the unemployment rate signals weakening labor demand and impending consumption slowdown, triggering negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 5-day forward returns are not negative following a 0.2pp UNRATE spike in >50% of triggered instances over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month growth in retail sales reflects resilient consumer spending that supports corporate revenue forecasts, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive month-over-month RSAFS changes do not coincide with positive S&P 500 5-day forward returns in >52% of weeks over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts exceeding 1800 thousand units indicate robust residential investment and construction sector health, which predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 60-day forward returns are not positive in >55% of months when HOUST exceeds 1800 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month industrial production growth predicts positive S&P 500 returns only when labor markets are tight, because capacity constraints amplify pricing power and earnings surprises over the next 20 trading days.
regime_hint: tight labor market with UNRATE below 6%
failure_condition: When UNRATE is below 6%, month-over-month INDPRO increases do not produce positive S&P 500 20-day forward returns in >55% of instances over a 2-year rolling window.
